packageRules.description: Query both the PyPI JSON and Simple APIs and merge results (pypi datasource uses registryStrategy=merge). PyPI's JSON API intermittently returns an empty 200 response, which Renovate reports as a 'no-result' lookup failure; the Simple index then supplies the versions instead. The JSON API stays first so release timestamps (used by minimumReleaseAge) and sourceUrl are retained whenever it responds normally.
